howPawnWorks.title: How Pawn Loans Work
howPawnWorks.subtitle: Get cash in 3 simple steps — no credit check required
howPawnWorks.step1Desc: Visit our shop with any valuable item — jewelry, electronics, instruments, and more.
howPawnWorks.step2Desc: Our certified appraisers evaluate your item and present a fair, transparent loan offer.
howPawnWorks.step3Desc: Accept the offer and receive cash on the spot. The entire process takes about 15 minutes.

about.title: About Golden Pawn
about.subtitle: Serving the community with fair loans and amazing finds since 1995
about.storyText: Founded in 1995 by Robert Goldstein, Golden Pawn started as a small neighborhood shop with a simple mission: provide fair, transparent financial services to people who need quick cash, without the hassle of traditional banking. Three decades later, we've grown into a full-service pawn broker and auction house, trusted by thousands of customers.
about.missionText: To provide accessible financial services and exceptional value through honest appraisals, fair loan terms, and a transparent auction marketplace.
